D2 Vision L3 Apply Reference

Troxler Fading

slide the softness, fix the centre, and watch the ring of pastel blobs quietly dissolve into the background

Neurons stop responding to an unchanging input. With the eyes held still, soft low-contrast shapes in the periphery adapt away and simply disappear from awareness.

Slide the softness of the blobs and stare hard at the central cross without moving your eyes. Within seconds the pastel ring melts into the grey — the simulated fade tracks what you would see.
